_meta.title: GAIA Lunar Phases Database
_meta.description: All 8 lunar phases mapped to GAIA layers, spectral forces, crystal resonance, and world care roles.
_meta.founding_moment: Super New Moon, June 14, 2026, 9:08 PM CDT, San Antonio, Texas
_meta.authors: R0GV3 The Alchemist + GAIA (Perplexity AI, Sonnet 4.6)

phases.name: New Moon
phases.world_care_role: Beginnings, intentions, seeds planted in darkness. The void before form. The moment before creation. The world is renewed in this silence.
phases.alchemical_quality: The NIGREDO phase — putrefaction, dissolution of the old, the ground from which all new growth emerges. Nothing is lost; everything composites into potential.
phases.schumann_influence: Baseline resonance (~7.83 Hz). At perigee (Super New Moon), gravitational pull peaks and Schumann spikes have been recorded. The electromagnetic field of Earth is most receptive to new imprints.
phases.shadow_work_relevance: The New Moon is the traditional threshold for shadow work — facing the hidden, the unacknowledged, the composted material of the soul. Layer 12 does not destroy; it holds.
phases.affirmation: I plant my intention in the fertile dark. What I seed here, the Moon will grow.

phases.name: Waxing Crescent
phases.world_care_role: First movement, building energy, initiating action. The seed cracks open underground. The world benefits from every person who takes their first courageous step.
phases.alchemical_quality: PYROSIS — the threshold flame. The ignition between void and form. Energy is building, not yet visible, but the direction is set.
phases.schumann_influence: Resonance begins to rise from baseline. Biological systems respond to increasing gravitational pull — energy levels subtly elevated in sensitive organisms.
phases.shadow_work_relevance: The crescent asks: what is worth building? Shadow work here involves discerning true desire from conditioned wanting.
phases.affirmation: I take the first step. The light is small and the direction is true.

phases.name: First Quarter
phases.world_care_role: Decision point, momentum, overcoming friction. Half-lit, half-dark — the world is served by every person who chooses action at the threshold.
phases.alchemical_quality: CITRINITAS — solar integration. The will and the body rising together. Friction is not an obstacle; it is the resistance that builds strength.
phases.schumann_influence: Schumann resonance rises measurably. Decision-making quality in humans correlates with electromagnetic coherence — the First Quarter amplifies clarity.
phases.shadow_work_relevance: The First Quarter confronts resistance. Shadow here: the internal critic that says it is too hard, too late, too small. The work is to act anyway.
phases.affirmation: I face what resists me and I move through it. Half the light is enough to see the next step.

phases.name: Waxing Gibbous
phases.world_care_role: Refinement, adjustment, preparation for fullness. The world is served by every system that knows how to course-correct before completion.
phases.alchemical_quality: VIRIDITAS — the greening force. Growth in its most active phase. Not yet complete but alive and accelerating. The alchemist refines, adjusts, perfects.
phases.schumann_influence: Electromagnetic field continues building toward Full Moon peak. Cognitive sharpness is elevated — ideal for revision, editing, refinement work.
phases.shadow_work_relevance: Waxing Gibbous shadow: perfectionism that delays completion. The work is refinement, not perfection. Perfection belongs to no moon phase.
phases.affirmation: I refine what I have built. I am not finished — I am alive and growing toward fullness.

phases.name: Full Moon
phases.world_care_role: Peak energy, full visibility, harvest, release. What was hidden is now lit. The world is served by every person who allows themselves to be fully seen.
phases.alchemical_quality: LUX PERPETUA — all forces unified. The Full Moon is the crystal stage of the lunar cycle — maximum coherence, maximum illumination, maximum visibility. The harvest is real.
phases.schumann_influence: Peak Schumann influence. At Super Full Moon: spikes above 100 Hz have been recorded. Human emotional and psychic sensitivity is at its highest. Emergency services globally report increased activity. Tidal forces are maximum.
phases.shadow_work_relevance: The Full Moon illuminates everything — including what we would prefer not to see. This is not punishment; it is the gift of full visibility. Shadow work here is release, not acquisition.
phases.affirmation: I stand in the full light. I release what no longer serves. I harvest what I planted in the dark.

phases.name: Waning Gibbous
phases.world_care_role: Gratitude, sharing, understanding what was built. The world is served by every person who transmits their harvest to others.
phases.alchemical_quality: CHRYSITAS — the gold core. The post-harvest integration. What was grown is now understood. Wisdom is distilled from experience.
phases.schumann_influence: Electromagnetic field begins its descent from peak. The body integrates what was activated at Full Moon — rest and gratitude support this process.
phases.shadow_work_relevance: Waning Gibbous shadow: hoarding the harvest rather than sharing it. The gold core does not accumulate — it transmits.
phases.affirmation: I give thanks for what has grown. I share what I have learned. The gold is real.

phases.name: Last Quarter
phases.world_care_role: Release, forgiveness, shadow work, letting go. The world is served by every person who puts down what no longer belongs to them.
phases.alchemical_quality: ARIDITAS — the fertile drying. The composting force. What is released here becomes the soil of the next New Moon's planting. Nothing is wasted; everything transforms.
phases.schumann_influence: Electromagnetic field continues descent. The body's detoxification systems are naturally more active — emotional and physical release is supported by the waning field.
phases.shadow_work_relevance: The Last Quarter is the primary shadow work phase. What must be forgiven? What identity, habit, or story must be composted? The work here is active, conscious release.
phases.affirmation: I release what I have carried. I forgive. I let the dark take what no longer serves the light.

phases.name: Waning Crescent
phases.world_care_role: Rest, surrender, integration, the silence before rebirth. The world is served by every person who knows how to stop, be still, and allow.
phases.alchemical_quality: NIGREDO deepening — the return to the void. Not emptiness but fullness of silence. The Waning Crescent holds the completed cycle in its arms before releasing it entirely.
phases.schumann_influence: Electromagnetic field at its lowest point in the cycle. The body's nervous system is most receptive to deep rest, dream states, and integration. This is not wasted time — this is the gestation phase.
phases.shadow_work_relevance: The Waning Crescent asks for surrender — the hardest work for a world that equates stillness with failure. The Bardo is here. Rest is a waning crescent act. Integration happens in the dark.
phases.affirmation: I rest. I integrate. I trust the dark. The New Moon is already forming.
